title: "Start Here"
---




> **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).**
> These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one.
> Last verified: **2026-01-18**.
>
> For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal)..

[Workflow roadmap](../roadmap.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}


## Quick start

This vignette gives a minimal, fully working workflow for an **unconditional** model and a **conditional** model. Everything uses short MCMC runs so the vignette renders quickly.

---

## Unconditional Model (CRP, bulk-only)


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
data("nc_pos200_k3", package = "DPmixGPD")
y <- nc_pos200_k3$y
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
bundle_uncond <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y,
  backend = "crp",
  kernel = "gamma",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = 5,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
fit_uncond <- load_or_fit("quickstart-start-here-fit_uncond", quiet_mcmc(run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_uncond, show_progress = FALSE)))
summary(fit_uncond)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025
n = 200 | components = 5
Summary
Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1

WAIC: 963.248
lppd: -456.908 | pWAIC: 24.716

Summary table
  parameter  mean    sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975    ess
 weights[1] 0.883 0.138  0.474  0.917      1  8.469
      alpha 0.457 0.398  0.022  0.354  1.503  42.38
   shape[1] 1.161 0.151  0.915  1.159  1.483 14.106
   scale[1] 0.265 0.037  0.204  0.266  0.338 25.996
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pred_q <- predict(fit_uncond, type = "quantile", p = c(0.5, 0.9), interval = "credible")
head(pred_q$fit)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  estimate index lower upper
1    0.228   0.5 0.135 0.342
2    0.687   0.9 0.467 0.915
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
safe_plot(pred_q)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](start-here_files/figure-html/start-uncond-predict-1.png){width=768}
:::
:::


---

## Conditional Model (SB, bulk-only)


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
data("nc_posX100_p3_k2", package = "DPmixGPD")
yc <- nc_posX100_p3_k2$y
X <- as.matrix(nc_posX100_p3_k2$X)
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
bundle_cond <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle(
  y = yc,
  X = X,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "lognormal",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = 5,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
fit_cond <- load_or_fit("quickstart-start-here-fit_cond", quiet_mcmc(run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_cond, show_progress = FALSE)))
summary(fit_cond)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
MixGPD summary | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Lognormal Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025
n = 100 | components = 5
Summary

lppd: -220.586 | pWAIC: 34.218

```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
x_new <- X[1:20, , drop = FALSE]
pred_mean <- predict(fit_cond, x = x_new, type = "mean", interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 200)
head(pred_mean$fit)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  id estimate lower upper
1  1      105  1.10  79.8
2  2     7223  1.19 430.8
3  3      184  1.07 482.5
4  4       52  0.97 341.5
5  5      115  1.11 267.8
6  6      497  1.13 405.8
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
safe_plot(pred_mean)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](start-here_files/figure-html/start-cond-predict-1.png){width=768}
:::
:::
